name: Citrus Rice Mold
recipeIngredient: 1 Orange, peeled, pith removed, separated into segments
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine rice, onions, green bell pepper, mayonnaise, parsley, salt, and pepper in a medium bowl.
2. Pack the mixture into a lightly oiled 8-inch-diameter ring mold.
3. Chill for 2 hours or until firm.
4. Gently invert the ring mold onto a serving plate and carefully turn out the rice mixture.
5. Replace any rice that may have come loose from the ring with more of the mixture.
6. Arrange orange and grapefruit segments around the edge of the plate.
7. Arrange chicory leaves and watercress in the center of the ring.
8. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
